creator: sten@blinkenlights.nl
text:
On Tue, 24 Feb 2009, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of irc/py-gozerbot,
>
> Please note that PR ports/132038 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>

Looks reasonable, although I'll have to test the changes introduced.
Additionally the new 0.9 version of the bot is still somewhat unstable,
I am coordinating with the author to get most of the issues worked out
so that we can provide a stable port for users.

-- 
Sten Spans

"There is a crack in everything, that's how the light gets in."
Leonard Cohen - Anthem
